# ADBPack — Premium B2B Packaging Solutions Manufacturer

## About
ADBPack is an ISO 9001:2015 certified B2B packaging manufacturer based in New Delhi, India. Founded in 2018 by Latika Upadhyay, the company has grown from a small production unit into a full-scale packaging manufacturing operation with a 50,000 sq.ft facility producing over 10 million units monthly. ADBPack is also registered on the Government e-Marketplace (GeM) and is MSME certified.

## Products

### Mono Cartons
Custom printed cartons with high-definition offset printing for pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, and FMCG products. Available in SBS, Duplex, and Kraft paper. Finishes include matt lamination, gloss lamination, velvet lamination, holographic lamination, spot UV, foil stamping, embossing, debossing, and PVC window. MOQ: 2000 sheets.

### Rigid Boxes
Premium luxury packaging boxes with magnetic closure options and custom inserts (foam, velvet, cardboard). Perfect for high-end products, corporate gifting, and D2C luxury brands. Available in art paper and textured papers with premium finishing options. MOQ: 1000 boxes.

### Corrugated Boxes
Structurally strong E-flute corrugated boxes for e-commerce, B2B logistics, and heavy retail products. Available in 3-ply, 4-ply, and 5-ply configurations. 100% recyclable and eco-friendly. Custom printing available with inside-out branding. MOQ: 2000 sheets.

### Pouches
Flexible packaging pouches including stand-up pouches, flat pouches, three-side seal, center seal, and spout pouches. Multi-layer laminate construction (PET/PE, BOPP/PE, aluminum foil laminates) with excellent moisture and oxygen barriers. Rotogravure printing up to 9 colors. MOQ: 5000 pouches.

### Cold Seal Blisters
Pressure-sensitive blister cards for heat-free sealing. Ideal for pharmaceuticals, confectionery, and delicate FMCG products. Tamper-evident with crystal clear product visibility. Available in SBS and Duplex paper quality. MOQ: 3000-5000 sheets.

### Hot Seal Blisters
Traditional heat-sealed blister packs with thermoformed plastic blisters bonded to coated backing cards. Provides tamper-evident retail display packaging with excellent product visibility and peg hole options. Available in SBS and Duplex.

### Self Adhesive Labels
Custom printed labels available on rolls and sheets. Materials include chromo paper, BOPP, PE, and PET. Adhesive options: hot-melt, acrylic, and removable. Suitable for pharma, food, cosmetics, logistics, and industrial applications. MOQ: 5000 labels.

### Canister Boxes
Cylindrical composite paper tube canisters for premium packaging of tea, coffee, cosmetics, and promotional items. Airtight inner lining options with tinplate, plastic, or paper cap closures. 360-degree printable surface. MOQ: 2000 canisters.

### Promotional Tape Rolls
Custom printed BOPP packaging tape with company logos and messaging. Available in 48mm and 72mm widths, 65m or custom lengths. Up to 3-color printing with acrylic or hot-melt adhesive. MOQ: 500 rolls.

## Capabilities
- 50,000 sq.ft state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in New Delhi, India
- Monthly production capacity: 10,000,000+ units
- ISO 9001:2015 certified quality management system
- 100% quality inspected products
- Modern offset printing and automated carton production lines
- Custom die-cutting, lamination, and finishing equipment

## Industries Served
- Pharmaceuticals and Healthcare
- Cosmetics and Personal Care
- FMCG (Fast-Moving Consumer Goods)
- Fitness Supplements and Nutraceuticals
- Liquor and Beverages
- E-Commerce and Logistics
- Food and Confectionery
- Corporate Gifting

## Certifications
- ISO 9001:2015 Quality Management
- GeM (Government e-Marketplace) Registered
- MSME Registered
- 100% Recyclable packaging commitment
